description: Tests state tracking of a 10-step plan after several steps are completed.

parts.text:
Here is our 10-step plan:
1. Init repo
2. Install deps
3. Config lint
4. Write tests
5. Implement core
6. Write UI
7. Build
8. Deploy
9. Verify
10. Announce
